tools.name: worksheet
tools.description: Creates printable A4 coloring/activity worksheets for Yuina (4yo). Generates images with FLUX AI locally via ComfyUI, assembles into a worksheet with title, instructions, labels, and borders. Saves PNG to Desktop.

tools.name: organise-files.sh
tools.description: Sorts files in Desktop and Downloads into organized folders by type. Runs automatically at 5am via LaunchAgent.

tools.name: voice-bubble.py
tools.description: Floating mic button for voice recording. Records audio, transcribes via Whisper, saves to Obsidian vault as voice note.

tools.name: whisper-record.sh
tools.description: Records audio from microphone and transcribes via local Whisper server.

tools.name: mechatron-memory-search
tools.description: Hybrid search (70% vector + 30% text) across workspace memory files. Uses SQLite FTS5 + bge-m3 embeddings via Ollama.

tools.name: mechatron-memory-index
tools.description: Index workspace memory files into SQLite FTS5 with bge-m3 vector embeddings. Run before searching.

tools.name: mechatron-cron
tools.description: Manage mechatron scheduled jobs via macOS LaunchAgents. Create, remove, list, run, and check status of cron jobs.
examples: mechatron-cron add daily-report --schedule '0 9 * * *' --task general -- -p 'Generate daily report'

tools.name: mechatron-tools
tools.description: On-demand MCP tool execution. Spawns sub-agent with full MCP access (Notion, n8n, Slack, server, etc.) for one-shot tool tasks.

tools.name: mechatron-spawn
tools.description: Spawn focused sub-agents for parallel/sequential task execution. Max 3 tasks per call, 60s timeout each, depth limit 1 (sub-agents cannot spawn more). Returns structured JSON results.
examples: mechatron-spawn ~/clawd "Summarize the latest Slack messages in #mgc-all" --parallel

tools.name: mechatron-ingest
tools.description: Pull knowledge from Slack, Notion, Claude sessions into workspace memory for RAG indexing. Run periodically to keep memory fresh.
